headline: HDS is FROZEN / on the shelf (2026-07-09). A complete, tested, shelved package: 133 components (Radix + cva), 351 DTCG tokens, ~110 Storybook stories, full guardrail suite, published @hirobius/design-system@0.12.0 on npm. Decision (build-vs-buy audit, verdict SPLIT): the DS was absorbing more maintenance than its two consumers justify — the clients marketing factory uses only the token spine (no React components), the only component consumer (internal ops dashboard) is dormant and already drift-broken. Final work folded in before freezing: #116 scroll recipe + stories (PR #119) and #64 CSS-only static-primitive layer (PR #120), both merged to main. Chromatic + release workflows set to manual-only; published 0.12.0 stays installable. All future work tracked in epic #80. Not ditched — checkoutable later.
next: Off-the-shelf trigger: restore pull_request/push triggers in .github/workflows/{chromatic,release}.yml and pick work from epic #80
Optional human step (credential-gated): npm deprecate @hirobius/design-system with a 'frozen' pointer
When ops resumes: vendor the ~26 used HDS components into ops/src/ui (per the build-vs-buy plan), drop the file: dep
blocked: All active DS development intentionally paused (frozen). Future work lives in #80.
